description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with two stages (verify then package) and three jobs. In the verify stage add a lint job that uses the node Docker image, runs "npm install" then "make check". Also in verify add a test job that uses the registry.gitlab.com/todo.txt-gnome-shell-extension/todo-txt-gnome-shell-extension/unit-testing:latest image and runs "RUNNER=xvfb-run make test". In the package stage add a create_zip job that uses the registry.gitlab.com/todo.txt-gnome-shell-extension/todo-txt-gnome-shell-extension/packaging:latest image, runs "./tools/make_dev.sh" and publishes any files matching todo*.zip as artifacts. Set the variable GIT_SUBMODULE_STRATEGY to normal.
